mutations: [TC001] Use relative imports ("./filename") for all cross-file references. Import fixture files exactly as documented in the task.
[TC001] The serializer must preserve enough structure for roundtrip fidelity. parse(serialize(parse(input))) must produce structurally equivalent ASTs.
[DP001] Use relative imports ("./filename") for all cross-file references. Import fixture files exactly as documented in the task.
[DP001] Strip BOM (\uFEFF) from the start of CSV input. Handle mixed line endings (CRLF/LF). Parse quoted fields that contain commas.
[DP001] Key patterns missing: aggregate, quality, BOM, referential. Make sure to implement all required methods and use the specified names.
[SD001] Always export the main class/function both as named export AND default export. Match the exact export names from the task spec.

[SD001] Three bugs to fix: (1) broker.ts race condition — add mutex/lock for concurrent subscribe/unsubscribe, (2) history.ts memory leak — prune internal array to maxHistory after each add, (3) router.ts off-by-one — wildcard * must match zero or more chars, not one or more.
[SD001] Key patterns missing: wildcard, prune, concurrent, lock, mutex. Make sure to implement all required methods and use the specified names.
[AR001] Implement cycle detection in the dependency resolver using DFS with a "visiting" set. When a cycle is found, throw an error that names the cycle path.
[AR001] getPlugin() must trigger lazy initialization: if the plugin is not yet loaded, resolve its dependency chain and init them in order before returning.
[CB001] When traversing for git repos, skip nested .git directories (submodules). Only count top-level repos. Parse git log format: "Author: Name <email>".
[CB001] Key patterns missing: repository, stats, extension, submodule. Make sure to implement all required methods and use the specified names.
[MR001] Key patterns missing: AC-3, arc, consistency, prune, propagate. Make sure to implement all required methods and use the specified names.
[TC001] Avoid infinite loops or unbounded waits. Worker polling must stop cleanly when stop() is called. Use bounded iteration counts.
[TC001] Key patterns missing: interpolation, recursive, children, tokenize. Make sure to implement all required methods and use the specified names.
[AR001] Always export the main class/function both as named export AND default export. Match the exact export names from the task spec.
[AR001] Key patterns missing: topological, lazy, cascade, requires. Make sure to implement all required methods and use the specified names.
